d.t: Đón tiếp khách VIP tại sảnh

e.p: Welcome to our hotel. Do you have a reservation?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận tên khách và thời gian đến. 2) Nói nếu cần hỗ trợ hành lý hoặc xe đưa đón.
e.h: Dùng Past Simple để xác nhận và will/going to để đề nghị giúp.
e.s: The reservation is under [studentName] and they arrived at 3 pm. I will help with the luggage and arrange a car if needed.

e.p: Can I see your ID and the booking confirmation, please?
e.m: 1) Nói đã đưa ID/confirmation hay chưa. 2) Nếu chưa, nói khi nào sẽ lấy và yêu cầu tạm giữ hành lý.
e.h: Use Past Simple + and/so; or will + V to promise action.
e.s: I have given the booking confirmation but I will get the ID from the car. Please hold the luggage at the desk until I return.

e.p: Would you like a welcome drink or a quieter seat while you wait?
e.m: 1) Chọn một tùy chọn (welcome drink hoặc chỗ yên). 2) Nói nếu có yêu cầu đặc biệt như đồ uống không cồn.
e.h: Use would like / would prefer and a short reason with because or so.
e.s: I would like a welcome drink and a quieter seat, please, because the guest is tired. A non-alcoholic drink is better for them.

e.p: Our VIP guest asked for a quick check-in. Can we speed up the process?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có thể sắp xếp nhanh không. 2) Nói rõ bước bạn sẽ làm để làm nhanh thủ tục.
e.h: Use can/can't and will + V to state actions.
e.s: Yes, we can speed up check-in and I will prepare a VIP form now. I will also call housekeeping to confirm the room is ready.

e.p: There is a small problem with the booking: the room type is not available. What should we offer?
e.m: 1) Đề xuất một giải pháp thay thế (room upgrade hoặc khác). 2) Nói lợi ích cho khách và xin lỗi ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use should/must and comparatives (more comfortable / less expensive).
e.s: We should offer a free room upgrade which is more comfortable and has a better view. I am sorry for the inconvenience and we will transfer the luggage now.

d.t: Giới thiệu khách VIP với đội ngũ

e.p: This is our VIP guest. Could you introduce yourself?
e.m: 1) Giới thiệu tên và chức vụ của bạn trong vài từ. 2) Nói một việc bạn sẽ làm để hỗ trợ khách.
e.h: Use Present Simple for introductions and will/going to for actions.
e.s: I am the front desk manager and my name is [studentName]. I will coordinate the room service and the schedule for the guest.

e.p: What time will the guest attend the meeting this afternoon?
e.m: 1) Nói giờ khách sẽ tham dự (use exact time). 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để chuẩn bị trước.
e.h: Use will/going to for plans and Present Simple for routines.
e.s: The guest will attend at 2:00 pm. I will prepare the meeting room and the documents before 1:30 pm.

e.p: The guest prefers quiet mornings. Can the team avoid calls?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận bạn hiểu yêu cầu. 2) Nói cách bạn sẽ thông báo cho đội ngũ.
e.h: Use must/should and a compound sentence with and/but.
e.s: I understand and we must avoid calls in the morning. I will inform housekeeping and the concierge now.

e.p: Security asks if the guest needs a private entrance.
e.m: 1) Nói liệu cần hay không. 2) Nếu cần, nêu lý do ngắn và thời gian sử dụng.
e.h: Use need/needn't and Past Simple or will for arrangements.
e.s: The guest needs a private entrance for security and privacy reasons. They will use it from 9 am to 10 am today.

e.p: Can you brief the driver about the VIP’s luggage and route?
e.m: 1) Liệt kê hai điểm chính bạn sẽ nói với tài xế (ví dụ: số kiện, địa điểm). 2) Nói khi nào tài xế nên đến.
e.h: Use imperatives or will + V and Past Simple for confirmation.
e.s: Tell the driver there are two large suitcases and one carry-on and the drop-off is the conference center. The driver should arrive at 1:30 pm.

d.t: Sắp xếp phòng và dịch vụ cho khách VIP

e.p: The VIP requested a king room with a sea view, is it ready?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận trạng thái phòng. 2) Nếu chưa, nêu khi nào phòng sẽ sẵn sàng.
e.h: Use Past Simple for status and will for future readiness.
e.s: The king room with a sea view is not ready yet. It will be ready by 2:00 pm.

e.p: Would the guest like late checkout tomorrow?
e.m: 1) Hỏi và ghi rõ thời gian checkout mong muốn. 2) Nói chính sách nếu cần phụ phí.
e.h: Use would like and can/might for possibilities; use comparatives if necessary.
e.s: They would like a late checkout at 2:00 pm. It may cost a small fee, but we can arrange it for VIP guests.

e.p: Housekeeping asks if they should use hypoallergenic bedding.
e.m: 1) Trả lời có nên dùng hay không. 2) Nếu có, nói lý do ngắn (sức khỏe hoặc yêu cầu khách).
e.h: Use should/must and because for reason.
e.s: They should use hypoallergenic bedding because the guest has mentioned allergies. Please change the sheets before arrival.

e.p: We can offer complimentary breakfast in the room or at the restaurant. Which is better?
e.m: 1) Chọn một lựa chọn cho khách. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn và thời gian phục vụ.
e.h: Use prefer/would rather and comparatives like more comfortable.
e.s: In-room breakfast is better because it is more private and comfortable. Please serve it at 8:00 am.

e.p: The guest asked for extra pillows and a quiet AC. How will you confirm these changes?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ thông báo cho bộ phận nào. 2) Xác nhận thời gian hoàn tất yêu cầu.
e.h: Use will + V to promise and Past Simple or Present Perfect for confirmations.
e.s: I will inform housekeeping and maintenance right now. They will deliver extra pillows and check the AC within 30 minutes.

d.t: Đặt chỗ nhà hàng và bữa ăn đặc biệt

e.p: The VIP wants a private table for dinner at 7 pm. Can you reserve it?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận bạn sẽ đặt bàn hay không. 2) Nói nếu cần yêu cầu thêm (menu riêng, chỗ ngồi).
e.h: Use will + V to confirm and should for suggestions.
e.s: I will reserve a private table for 7 pm. I will also request a special menu and a quiet corner.

e.p: The guest is vegetarian and asks about the menu options.
e.m: 1) Nói hai món chay phù hợp. 2) Nói bạn sẽ thông báo cho bếp.
e.h: Use Present Simple for menu and will for actions.
e.s: We have a grilled vegetable salad and a mushroom risotto available. I will inform the kitchen to prepare those options.

e.p: There is a change: the guest prefers a lighter meal tonight.
e.m: 1) Đề xuất hai món nhẹ. 2) Nói cách phục vụ (in-room hoặc nhà hàng).
e.h: Use would prefer and can for options.
e.s: They would prefer a soup and a small salad for a lighter meal. We can serve it in-room if they want privacy.

e.p: The chef asks if the guest has any allergies or dislikes.
e.m: 1) Liệt kê một cách ngắn các dị ứng nếu có. 2) Nói bạn sẽ ghi chú cho phục vụ.
e.h: Use have/has for allergies and will + V to take action.
e.s: The guest has a shellfish allergy and dislikes spicy food. I will note this on the order and tell the waiter.

e.p: After dinner, the guest asked for the bill to be sent to their company. How do you arrange that?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận cách tính và người nhận hóa đơn. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để gửi hóa đơn (email/print).
e.h: Use will + V and Past Simple to confirm actions.
e.s: We will charge the bill to the company account under the guest's name. I will email a copy and print one for the guest.

d.t: Giải quyết yêu cầu đặc biệt đột xuất

e.p: The VIP called and asked for a translator immediately, can we find one?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có tìm được hay không. 2) Nêu khi nào người phiên dịch sẽ có mặt.
e.h: Use can/can't and will + V for arrangements.
e.s: Yes, we can find a translator and one will arrive in 20 minutes. I have contacted our on-call translator.

e.p: The guest needs a late-night pharmacy item. What will you do?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ liên hệ đâu (pharmacy/delivery). 2) Nêu thời gian nhận hàng.
e.h: Use will + V and Past Simple for confirmation.
e.s: I will contact the 24-hour pharmacy and arrange delivery. They should arrive in about 30 minutes.

e.p: There is a request for an impromptu meeting room for 10 people in 1 hour.
e.m: 1) Xác nhận phòng có sẵn hay không. 2) Nói bạn sẽ chuẩn bị gì (thiết bị, nước).
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V to promise preparation.
e.s: We can prepare a meeting room for 10 people and it will be ready in 45 minutes. I will set up a projector and provide water.

e.p: The VIP asks for quiet time and no cleaning during the stay. How will you record this?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ ghi chú ở đâu (hệ thống/phiếu). 2) Nêu bạn sẽ thông báo cho bộ phận liên quan.
e.h: Use will + V and must/should to give instruction.
e.s: I will add a 'Do Not Disturb' note in the booking system. I will also notify housekeeping and reception.

e.p: A special gift was delivered and the guest asked to keep it private. What do you do?
e.m: 1) Trả lời cách bảo quản món quà. 2) Nói ai được phép biết về món quà.
e.h: Use will + V and should/must for confidentiality.
e.s: We will keep the gift in the secure safe and mark it confidential. Only the front desk manager and the guest will be informed.

d.t: Xử lý khi khách VIP trễ chuyến/đến muộn

e.p: The VIP flight was delayed and they will arrive late. What do you tell the driver?
e.m: 1) Nói thời gian mới đến của khách. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để điều chỉnh đón khách.
e.h: Use will + V for future arrival and can for arrangements.
e.s: The guest will arrive at 11:30 pm due to the delay. I can ask the driver to wait until midnight and update him if there is any change.

e.p: The guest called and said they are stuck at customs. How do you respond?
e.m: 1) Hỏi thời gian ước tính họ rời customs. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trong khi chờ.
e.h: Use will/going to for planned actions and Present Simple for questions.
e.s: When do you expect to leave customs? We will keep the room and the driver ready until you arrive.

e.p: Due to late arrival, the guest missed their reserved dinner. What can we offer?
e.m: 1) Đề xuất hai lựa chọn bù đắp (in-room meal/late table). 2) Nói lợi ích hoặc chi phí nếu có.
e.h: Use should/ can and comparatives to explain benefits.
e.s: We can offer an in-room meal or a late table at the restaurant. In-room dining is more private and we can serve it without extra charge for VIPs.

e.p: The VIP is tired and asks to skip the welcome meeting. How do you reply?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận sẽ hủy hoặc dời cuộc họp. 2) Nêu thời gian thay thế hoặc tài liệu bạn sẽ gửi.
e.h: Use will + V for changes and Past Simple for confirmations.
e.s: We will postpone the welcome meeting as requested. I will send a short agenda and a new time by email tomorrow morning.

e.p: The guest will arrive at 2 am instead of evening. What must security know?
e.m: 1) Nêu hai điều an ninh cần biết (thời gian, phương tiện). 2) Nói bạn sẽ đảm bảo an toàn như thế nào.
e.h: Use must/should and will + V for actions.
e.s: Security must know the arrival time is 2 am and the vehicle plate number. I will assign a security guard to escort the guest to the room.

d.t: Hỗ trợ an ninh và riêng tư cho khách VIP

e.p: The guest asked for discreet check-in to avoid photographers. Can we do that?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có thể thực hiện hay không. 2) Nêu bước cụ thể để làm kín đáo (lối vào riêng, thời gian).
e.h: Use can/can't and will + V for actions.
e.s: Yes, we can do a discreet check-in. We will use a private entrance and schedule it at an off-peak time.

e.p: Security wants the guest's schedule for the day. How much should we share?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ chia sẻ phần nào (chỉ thời gian, không chi tiết). 2) Nêu lý do giữ kín các thông tin khác.
e.h: Use should/must and because for reason.
e.s: We should share only the times of public events and not the private meetings. This is to protect the guest's privacy and safety.

e.p: A staff member asked to see the guest’s name for a service. What is the correct response?
e.m: 1) Nói nếu tên được tiết lộ hay giữ kín. 2) Nêu ai có quyền biết tên khách.
e.h: Use must/should and will + V for permission.
e.s: We must keep the guest's name confidential. Only the manager and the assigned staff should have access to it.

e.p: If a paparazzi waits outside, what immediate steps do you take?
e.m: 1) Nêu hai bước an ninh bạn sẽ thực hiện ngay (ví dụ: thay lối vào, gọi bảo vệ). 2) Nói bạn sẽ báo cho ai tiếp theo.
e.h: Use will + V and imperatives for instructions.
e.s: We will change the guest's entrance route and call the security team. I will inform the manager and keep reception updated.

e.p: The guest asked to erase a staff record of their visit. Is that allowed?
e.m: 1) Trả lời về chính sách (có thể/xin phép/xóa được hay không). 2) Nêu bước bạn sẽ làm nếu không thể xóa (ví dụ: ẩn thông tin).
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V to explain alternatives.
e.s: We cannot delete official records without approval. We will request permission from management and we can hide personal details while keeping the record.

d.t: Giao tiếp qua email với khách VIP

e.p: Subject: Welcome. Can you confirm your arrival time by email?
e.m: 1) Trả lời email xác nhận giờ đến. 2) Nêu một yêu cầu nhỏ thêm nếu cần (ví dụ: số hành lý).
e.h: Use Present Simple for facts and will for offers; keep sentences short.
e.s: The arrival time is 3:00 pm. Please let us know the number of luggage items.

e.p: We sent the itinerary; do you want any changes?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận nếu cần thay đổi hay không. 2) Nêu một điều bạn muốn sửa (thời gian hoặc địa điểm).
e.h: Use would like / prefer and will + V for confirmation.
e.s: I would like to change the meeting time to 4:00 pm. Please update the location to the west conference room.

e.p: Can we email the bill to your company after checkout?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có đồng ý nhận hóa đơn qua email không. 2) Nêu địa chỉ email hoặc người nhận (dùng placeholder nếu là thông tin cá nhân).
e.h: Use will + V for promises and Present Simple for facts.
e.s: Yes, please email the bill to finance@[studentCompany].com and address it to the accounts payable. We will send it after checkout.

e.p: There was a small billing error and we need to correct it. How do you prefer we inform you?
e.m: 1) Chọn kênh thông báo (email/phone). 2) Nói bạn sẽ sửa lỗi và khi nào xong.
e.h: Use will + V and can for options.
e.s: Please inform me by email. We will correct the bill today and resend it by this evening.

e.p: The guest asked for a short welcome note in their room. Can you draft one?
e.m: 1) Viết hai câu chào ngắn cho note (lịch sự, chuyên nghiệp). 2) Nêu bạn sẽ để note ở đâu và khi nào.
e.h: Use short Present Simple sentences and will + V for placement.
e.s: Welcome and enjoy your stay with us. We will leave this note on the bedside table before the guest arrives.

d.t: Xử lý phàn nàn của khách VIP

e.p: The VIP said the room was noisy last night. What do you say first?
e.m: 1) Xin lỗi ngắn gọn. 2) Nêu bạn sẽ làm gì để khắc phục ngay.
e.h: Use I'm sorry and will + V for solutions.
e.s: I'm sorry for the disturbance. I will move the guest to a quieter room and check soundproofing.

e.p: The guest complained about slow Wi-Fi during a meeting. How do you respond?
e.m: 1) Thừa nhận vấn đề. 2) Nêu hành động bạn sẽ làm để sửa (liên hệ kỹ thuật, tăng băng thông).
e.h: Use Past Simple for complaint and will for fixes.
e.s: I understand the Wi-Fi was slow during your meeting. We will contact IT and increase the bandwidth immediately.

e.p: They said room service arrived late. Explain and make it right.
e.m: 1) Giải thích ngắn (ví dụ: lỗi giao tiếp). 2) Đề xuất bồi thường nhỏ hoặc biện pháp khắc phục.
e.h: Use because/so for reason and should/can for compensation.
e.s: The delay happened because of a miscommunication in the kitchen. We should offer a complimentary dessert or a discount on the meal.

e.p: The guest is unhappy with the dinner menu and wants a refund.
e.m: 1) Trả lời nếu bạn có thể hoàn tiền hay không. 2) Nêu giải pháp thay thế nếu không thể hoàn tiền (voucher, free dish).
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V for alternative offers.
e.s: We can offer a refund if the meal did not meet standards. If a refund is not possible, we will provide a voucher or a complimentary replacement dish.

e.p: A serious complaint reached management. How will you report it?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ tóm tắt vấn đề chính (một câu). 2) Nêu hai hành động đã làm để giải quyết.
e.h: Use Past Simple for events and will/have to for actions taken.
e.s: The guest complained about noise and slow service during a meeting. I have moved them to a quiet room and contacted IT and kitchen to resolve the issues.

d.t: Đối phó với tình huống y tế khẩn cấp

e.p: The VIP feels unwell and asks for medical help. What do you say?
e.m: 1) Hỏi triệu chứng ngắn gọn. 2) Nói bạn sẽ gọi y tá hoặc xe cứu thương.
e.h: Use Present Simple for symptoms and will + V for actions.
e.s: What are your symptoms now? I will call the nurse and arrange an ambulance if needed.

e.p: The nurse says the guest needs medication immediately. How do you respond?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận bạn sẽ cho phép hay tiếp nhận. 2) Nêu ai sẽ trả chi phí hoặc ghi chú vào hồ sơ.
e.h: Use will + V and must/should for responsibilities.
e.s: We will allow immediate medication as advised. The cost must be charged to the guest's account and recorded in the medical note.

e.p: If the guest prefers to go to a private clinic, what steps will you take?
e.m: 1) Nêu hai bước bạn sẽ làm (gọi xe, chuẩn bị hồ sơ). 2) Nói bạn sẽ thông báo cho ai trong khách sạn.
e.h: Use will + V and can for possibilities.
e.s: I will call a private clinic and arrange transport. I will also inform security and the front desk.

e.p: After the incident, management asks for a report. What do you include?
e.m: 1) Tóm tắt ngắn các sự kiện chính (một câu). 2) Nêu hai hành động phòng ngừa sẽ thực hiện.
e.h: Use Past Simple for events and will/should for prevention steps.
e.s: The guest felt unwell at 10 am and received medical attention from our nurse. We will review emergency procedures and provide staff training to prevent delays.

e.p: The guest wants privacy and no staff visits after treatment. How do you confirm?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận yêu cầu riêng tư. 2) Nêu bạn sẽ làm cho đội ngũ tuân thủ (ghi chú, giới hạn truy cập).
e.h: Use will + V and must/should for compliance.
e.s: We will respect the guest's privacy and no staff will visit unless requested. I will note this in the booking and inform all departments.

d.t: Hẹn gặp và quản lý lịch trình cho khách VIP

e.p: The guest wants a meeting with the CEO tomorrow morning. Can we schedule it?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận CEO có thời gian hay không. 2) Nêu giờ bạn sẽ đề xuất cho cuộc họp.
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V for proposals.
e.s: The CEO is available and can meet tomorrow morning. I will propose 9:30 am for the meeting.

e.p: They asked for two back-to-back meetings; how do you manage travel time?
e.m: 1) Nói khoảng thời gian di chuyển bạn sẽ để giữa hai cuộc họp. 2) Nêu cách bạn sẽ sắp xếp phương tiện nếu cần.
e.h: Use will + V and comparatives to explain time allocation.
e.s: I will allow 30 minutes between meetings for travel and rest. We will arrange a car if the locations are far.

e.p: A meeting was cancelled and the guest asks to add leisure time instead.
e.m: 1) Xác nhận bạn sẽ thay đổi lịch. 2) Đề xuất một hoạt động thư giãn ngắn phù hợp.
e.h: Use will + V and would like/prefer for choices.
e.s: I will change the schedule and free up that hour. I suggest a short spa session which is relaxing and nearby.

e.p: The guest asks for reminders before each event. How do you set them?
e.m: 1) Nêu phương thức nhắc (phone/email/in-room). 2) Nói bao lâu trước mỗi sự kiện bạn sẽ nhắc (ví dụ: 30 phút).
e.h: Use will + V and can for options; use Present Simple for routines.
e.s: We will send reminders by phone and in-room notification. I will remind them 30 minutes before each event.

e.p: There is a tight schedule and the guest asks if it is possible to rest more. What do you suggest?
e.m: 1) Đề nghị một thay đổi để tăng thời gian nghỉ (rút ngắn một cuộc họp hoặc di chuyển). 2) Nêu lợi ích ngắn của thay đổi.
e.h: Use should/shouldn't and comparatives to explain benefit.
e.s: We should shorten the morning meeting to 30 minutes so the guest can rest. This will make them feel more comfortable and ready for the afternoon.

d.t: Giữ bí mật và quản lý thông tin nhạy cảm

e.p: A vendor asked for the guest's contact number to confirm a delivery. Can we share it?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có thể chia sẻ hay không. 2) Nếu không, nêu cách khác để xác nhận (liên hệ qua reception).
e.h: Use cannot/should not and will + V for alternatives.
e.s: We cannot share the guest's contact number. We will ask the vendor to contact reception and we will relay the message.

e.p: The guest requested that their stay not be mentioned on social media. How do you comply?
e.m: 1) Nêu hai bước bạn sẽ làm để đảm bảo điều đó. 2) Nói ai sẽ chịu trách nhiệm giám sát.
e.h: Use will + V and must for responsibilities.
e.s: We will instruct staff not to post and monitor official channels for any mentions. The communications manager must oversee this policy.

e.p: A staff member accidentally mentioned the guest's visit to a friend. What is your response?
e.m: 1) Nêu hành động kỷ luật hoặc nhắc nhở ngắn. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để ngăn tái phạm.
e.h: Use should/need to and will + V for corrective steps.
e.s: They should receive a formal reminder about confidentiality. We will provide additional training and record the incident.

e.p: Management asks for a log of everyone who met the guest. What information will you include?
e.m: 1) Liệt kê hai mục cần ghi (tên người, giờ gặp). 2) Nêu ai được phép xem log này.
e.h: Use will + V and must for permissions.
e.s: I will record the staff name and the meeting time for each visitor. Only management and security will be allowed to view the log.

e.p: The guest asked to remove their photos from the hotel's online album. How will you handle it?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ kiểm tra và xóa nếu tìm thấy. 2) Nêu khi nào bạn sẽ báo lại khách.
e.h: Use will + V and can for permissions; use Past Simple for confirmation.
e.s: I will review the online album and remove any photos of the guest. I will report back to them by the end of the day.

d.t: Ôn tập: Đón tiếp và hỗ trợ VIP

e.p: A VIP arrives early and asks if the room is ready. What do you say?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận trạng thái phòng. 2) Nêu hai bước bạn sẽ làm nếu phòng chưa sẵn sàng.
e.h: Use is/are for status and will + V for actions.
e.s: The room is not ready yet. I will offer a welcome drink and store the luggage until the room is prepared.

e.p: The guest prefers no photos and asks staff to be discreet. How do you inform the team?
e.m: 1) Nói ngắn cách bạn sẽ truyền đạt yêu cầu. 2) Nêu ai cần biết và làm gì để thực hiện.
e.h: Use will + V and must for obligations.
e.s: I will send a quick message to all staff about the no-photo request. Front desk and security must ensure discretion during the stay.

e.p: A VIP needs quick transport to an event in 20 minutes. What do you arrange?
e.m: 1) Nêu phương tiện và thời gian đến dự kiến. 2) Nói bạn sẽ thông báo cho tài xế về yêu cầu đặc biệt.
e.h: Use will + V and can for arrangements.
e.s: I will arrange a car and it can arrive in 10 minutes. I will tell the driver about the fast pickup and the guest's luggage.

e.p: The guest asked for a private dining area tonight. How will you confirm?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận đặt phòng riêng được sắp xếp hay chưa. 2) Nêu bạn sẽ làm gì nếu nhà hàng đầy chỗ.
e.h: Use have/has + Past Participle for confirmations and will for alternatives.
e.s: The private dining area has been reserved for tonight. If the restaurant is fully booked, we will arrange an exclusive in-room dining experience.

e.p: The VIP left a note saying they prefer quiet mornings. How do you implement this across shifts?
e.m: 1) Nêu hai thay đổi hành động cho các ca (không gọi, không dọn phòng). 2) Nói bạn sẽ ghi chú ở đâu để các ca sau biết.
e.h: Use will + V and must for required actions.
e.s: Staff will not call or clean the room in the morning hours. I will add a note to the reservation system for all shifts to follow.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xử lý sự cố và yêu cầu đặc biệt

e.p: A VIP's luggage was delayed. What immediate help do you provide?
e.m: 1) Nêu một hành động ngay lập tức để hỗ trợ khách. 2) Nói khi nào hành lý sẽ được giao.
e.h: Use will + V and can for offers.
e.s: I will provide a change of clothes and basic items from our shop. The luggage can be delivered within two hours.

e.p: The guest requested a last-minute meeting room change. How do you confirm it?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận phòng mới có sẵn hay không. 2) Nêu hai điều bạn sẽ chuẩn bị cho phòng mới.
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V for preparations.
e.s: The new meeting room is available. I will set up the projector and arrange seating for ten people.

e.p: There was a complaint about noise from nearby construction. How do you respond?
e.m: 1) Xin lỗi và thừa nhận vấn đề. 2) Đề xuất hai giải pháp để giảm tiếng ồn.
e.h: Use I'm sorry and will/should for solutions.
e.s: I'm sorry for the construction noise. We will provide earplugs and offer a complimentary room change to a quieter area.

e.p: A VIP asked for a personal item to be sent to another city. What steps do you take?
e.m: 1) Nêu ba bước ngắn để gửi đồ (gói, gửi, thông báo). 2) Nêu cách bạn theo dõi lô hàng.
e.h: Use will + V and Past Simple for confirmations.
e.s: I will pack the item securely, arrange a trusted courier, and notify the recipient. I will track the shipment and send updates to the guest.

e.p: The guest requests a private workout trainer within 2 hours. Can you arrange it?
e.m: 1) Trả lời khả năng sắp xếp. 2) Nêu chi tiết ngắn (có phí/miễn phí, nơi tập).
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V to explain terms.
e.s: We can arrange a private trainer within two hours. It will have a small fee and the session can be in the gym or in-room.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giao tiếp hàng ngày với VIP

e.p: Good morning. Do you need anything for today’s schedule?
e.m: 1) Nói có cần hỗ trợ lịch trình hay không. 2) Nếu có, nêu một yêu cầu bạn muốn (ví dụ: thay đổi giờ).
e.h: Use Present Simple for routines and will for offers.
e.s: Yes, I need to move the 11 am meeting to 12 pm. Please confirm the change with the attendees.

e.p: The guest asks for weather and traffic updates before travel. How do you inform them?
e.m: 1) Nêu một câu tóm tắt thời tiết. 2) Nêu lời khuyên về khung giờ đi để tránh kẹt xe.
e.h: Use Present Simple for weather and should for advice.
e.s: It is sunny with light clouds today. You should leave 30 minutes earlier to avoid peak traffic.

e.p: Can we arrange a quiet workspace in the lounge for two hours?
e.m: 1) Xác nhận chỗ làm việc có sẵn hay không. 2) Nêu bạn sẽ chuẩn bị gì cho không gian đó.
e.h: Use can/cannot and will + V for preparations.
e.s: We can reserve a quiet workspace in the lounge. I will prepare a table, power outlet, and a pitcher of water.

e.p: The guest wants a daily brief every morning. What will you include?
e.m: 1) Liệt kê hai mục chính trong bản tóm tắt (lịch, cuộc họp). 2) Nêu khi nào bạn sẽ gửi bản brief.
e.h: Use will + V and Present Simple for schedules.
e.s: I will include the day's schedule and any meeting locations. I will send the brief at 8:00 am each morning.

e.p: A VIP thanked staff for the service and asked for one improvement. How do you reply?
e.m: 1) Cảm ơn ngắn và nhận ý kiến. 2) Nêu bạn sẽ thay đổi gì và khi nào bắt đầu.
e.h: Use Thank you and will + V for commitments.
e.s: Thank you for the feedback, we appreciate it. We will implement the change starting tomorrow and monitor the results.
